name: card-setting
title: CardSetting
description: Settings page section shell composed on ds-card with view/edit header actions. Edit state is controlled by the parent.

cardWidth.description:
Card width token (`sm` / `md` / `lg`). Also sets host `min-height` to the
matching `--dimension-card-height-*` so the body fills available space
even when the slot is empty.

editing.description: Controlled edit state — parent owns single-edit orchestration.

heading.description: Section heading shown in the card header.

events.name: dsEditingChange
events.description: Emits when the user enters or exits edit mode.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
